scripts.build:proto:v1: pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -o src/generated/proto-v1.js --path src/proto src/proto/t4/v1/service.proto && pbts -o src/generated/proto-v1.d.ts src/generated/proto-v1.js
scripts.build:proto:v2: pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -o src/generated/proto-v2.js --path src/proto src/proto/t4/v2/service.proto && pbts -o src/generated/proto-v2.d.ts src/generated/proto-v2.js
scripts.build:proto: npm run copy-proto && npm run build:proto:v1 && npm run build:proto:v2
scripts.build: npm run build:proto && webpack && tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir types --declarationDir types
